narration: What if your heartbeat is telling you more than you think?

narration: An ECG, or electrocardiogram, captures the electrical activity of your heart.
visual_description: Context visual: An ECG, or electrocardiogram, captures the electrical activity of your heart.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: An ECG, or electrocardiogram, captures the electrical activity of your heart.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: An ECG, or electrocardiogram, captures the electrical activity of your heart.

narration: But why is this important? Your heart's rhythm can reveal hidden issues.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But why is this important? Your heart's rhythm can reveal hidden issues.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But why is this important? Your heart's rhythm can reveal hidden issues.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But why is this important? Your heart's rhythm can reveal hidden issues.

narration: For instance, irregularities can indicate arrhythmias or even heart attacks.
visual_description: Evidence visual: For instance, irregularities can indicate arrhythmias or even heart attacks.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: For instance, irregularities can indicate arrhythmias or even heart attacks.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: For instance, irregularities can indicate arrhythmias or even heart attacks.
